textByHashes.b3b0324828d73e91c8595e68165130e41c31f3db: So? Why should I be giving it to you? What you do for Wormbrain?
textByHashes.cbff3a1786db52b0df4482cd12db12f0b048aaf8: Ha! Me in here and you out dere. You not get map piece.
textByHashes.d88f8be8a2ea921f6f725ab305cdf7254ebd3a78: Me not stoopid, it worth at least 10,000 coins!
textByHashes.6863142b36cdc7f3e7546cfa2779e03b4230621a: Fine, you not get map piece.
textByHashes.4835c6a32534d01ac0866f63de562b3d0871d3c6: Comes back when you has enough.
textByHashes.62b671ca9982b4abb94f28f8a479ea5b952383f9: Fank you very much! Now me can bribe da guards, hehehe.
textByHashes.400512c57994eed5c3e7934054c9f3c8424f1f99: We rob house of stupid wizard. She very old, not put up much fight at all. [laugh][laugh]!
textByHashes.31a29f225a3c5748e2cf16ba0d907333893d887e: Her house full of pictures of a city on island and old pictures of people. Me not recognise island.
textByHashes.3ddee6065531f43f884efdfcc0436ef1f50d2394: Me find map piece. Me not know what it is, but it in locked box so me figure it important.
textByHashes.8940ca4536d0df0db6cdb5fc9da4e5d694116373: But, by the time me get box open, other goblins gone. Then me not run fast enough and guards catch me.
textByHashes.013569c6725760386652fe638a732b789368b842: But now you want map piece so must be special! What you do for me to get it?
textByHashes.6e2d2f5eee6c167baaa8f4ea62cf1d14e5254e84: Me not sure. Me pick some stuff up and take it away.
